description: Escape to the vibrant city of Taipei, where modernity meets tradition amidst lush landscapes and breathtaking views. Over the course of six days, immerse yourself in the rich culture, indulge in delectable street food, and find tranquility in the city's serene parks and mountains. This journey is designed for relaxation and exploration, allowing you to unwind while discovering the hidden gems of this dynamic city.

activities.description: Arrive at your hotel in Taipei and settle in. A great choice for a relaxing stay is the 'Hotel Midtown Richardson', which offers comfortable rooms and is centrally located.

Savor a delicious meal at the famous Din Tai Fung, known for its mouthwatering xiaolongbao (soup dumplings). The restaurant's atmosphere is lively, making it a perfect spot to start your Taipei adventure.

Head to Taipei 101, one of the tallest buildings in the world. Take the high-speed elevator to the observation deck for breathtaking views of the city and surrounding mountains. Don't forget to snap some photos!
Explore the vibrant Ximending district, known for its shopping, street food, and lively atmosphere. It's a great place to soak in the local culture and perhaps pick up some unique souvenirs.

activities.activity: Dinner at Ay Chung Rice Noodle
activities.description: Enjoy a casual dinner at Ay Chung Rice Noodle, famous for its delicious and comforting rice noodles in a flavorful broth. A must-try for a true taste of Taipei's street food scene.
End your day with a peaceful stroll in Daan Forest Park. This urban oasis is perfect for unwinding amidst nature, with beautiful walking paths and serene ponds.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Yonghe Soy Milk King
activities.description: Start your day with a traditional Taiwanese breakfast at Yonghe Soy Milk King, famous for its fresh soy milk and crispy fried dough sticks. It's a local favorite and a perfect way to fuel up for a day of exploration.

Visit the iconic Taipei 101 and head up to the observatory for breathtaking views of the city. On a clear day, you can see all the way to the mountains surrounding Taipei. Don't forget to take some photos!
After enjoying the views, take some time to explore the Taipei 101 Mall located at the base of the tower. Here, you can find luxury shops, local boutiques, and even some great cafes to relax in.
Indulge in a delicious lunch at Din Tai Fung, renowned for its xiaolongbao (soup dumplings). The restaurant's meticulous preparation and delightful flavors make it a must-visit for any food lover.

Take a short hike up Elephant Mountain for a stunning view of Taipei, especially during the late afternoon. The trail is well-maintained and offers several viewpoints along the way, making it a popular spot for both locals and tourists.
After your hike, unwind at Daan Forest Park, a beautiful green space in the heart of the city. Enjoy a leisurely stroll, or simply relax on a bench and soak in the natural surroundings.

End your day with a visit to Shilin Night Market, where you can sample a variety of street foods. Try the famous fried chicken steak and bubble tea while enjoying the vibrant atmosphere of the market.
Start your day with a delicious Taiwanese breakfast at a local café. Try the classic dan bing (egg crepe) and a warm soy milk for a hearty meal.
Head to Yangmingshan National Park, known for its stunning landscapes and hot springs. Enjoy a leisurely hike through the lush trails and take in the breathtaking views of the mountains and valleys.
After your hike, enjoy lunch at a nearby restaurant specializing in local dishes. Don't miss the chance to try the famous beef noodle soup, a comforting and flavorful dish.
Relax in one of the natural hot springs in Yangmingshan. The soothing waters are perfect for unwinding after a day of hiking, surrounded by nature's beauty.
On your way back, stop by the Flower Clock, a beautiful landmark in the park. It's a great spot for photos and to enjoy the vibrant floral displays.

activities.activity: Dinner at a Local Night Market
activities.description: End your day with dinner at a local night market. Sample a variety of street food, from stinky tofu to bubble tea, and soak in the lively atmosphere.
After a fulfilling day, head back to your hotel to relax and recharge for the next day's adventures.

transit.memo: Take the bus from Taipei to Tamsui for a scenic ride along the river.

activities.description: Stroll through the vibrant Tamsui Old Street, where you can sample local snacks like A-gei (fried tofu stuffed with noodles) and enjoy the charming atmosphere of this historic area.

activities.activity: Lunch at a Local Seafood Restaurant
activities.description: Indulge in a delicious seafood lunch at one of the local restaurants along the waterfront, where you can enjoy fresh catches of the day while overlooking the river.
Visit the picturesque Fisherman's Wharf, famous for its beautiful sunset views and the iconic Lover's Bridge. Take a leisurely walk along the pier and soak in the serene surroundings.
Unwind at the Tamsui Riverside Park, where you can enjoy the peaceful ambiance, take a nap on the grass, or simply watch the boats go by on the river.
Head back to Taipei via bus, reflecting on the beautiful sights and flavors of Tamsui.
Experience the bustling atmosphere of Shilin Night Market, where you can try a variety of street foods, shop for souvenirs, and enjoy the lively night scene.
End your day by relaxing at a cozy café in Taipei, sipping on a cup of Taiwanese bubble tea or coffee, and enjoying the local vibe.
Start your day with a delicious breakfast at a cozy café in Taipei. Enjoy a traditional Taiwanese breakfast set with soy milk and fried dough sticks, perfect for fueling your day ahead.
Head to Beitou, famous for its natural hot springs. Relax in the soothing waters and enjoy the serene surroundings. Don't forget to visit the public hot spring for a unique experience!
Savor a delightful lunch at a local restaurant in Beitou, where you can try traditional Taiwanese dishes like beef noodle soup or braised pork rice.
Visit the stunning Beitou Library, known for its eco-friendly design and beautiful wooden architecture. Take a moment to relax in the peaceful reading areas surrounded by nature.
Stroll through Beitou Park, where you can enjoy the lush greenery and scenic views. It's a perfect spot for a leisurely walk or to simply unwind in nature.
Head back to Taipei City, taking in the sights along the way. You can choose to relax at your accommodation or explore nearby attractions.
End your day with a delicious dinner at Din Tai Fung, famous for its xiaolongbao (soup dumplings). Enjoy the bustling atmosphere and savor the flavors of Taiwan.

transit.memo: Take the MRT to Taipei Main Station and then transfer to the airport shuttle.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Yonghe Soy Milk King
activities.description: Start your day with a traditional Taiwanese breakfast at Yonghe Soy Milk King, famous for its warm soy milk and crispy fried dough sticks. A perfect way to fuel up before your journey!
Head to Taipei 101, once the tallest building in the world. Take the high-speed elevator to the observation deck for breathtaking views of the city and beyond. Don't forget to snap some photos!
After the hustle and bustle of the city, unwind at Daan Forest Park. This urban oasis features beautiful walking paths, ponds, and plenty of green space to relax and enjoy nature.
Savor a delicious lunch at Din Tai Fung, renowned for its xiaolongbao (soup dumplings). The restaurant's meticulous preparation and flavorful dishes make it a must-visit.
Visit the National Palace Museum, home to an extensive collection of Chinese art and artifacts. Take your time to appreciate the rich history and culture on display.
Before heading to the airport, take a leisurely stroll through Shilin Night Market. Sample local street food and pick up some last-minute souvenirs to remember your trip.

activities.activity: Transit to Taipei Taoyuan International Airport
activities.description: Make your way to the airport for your departure. Ensure you leave with enough time to check in and relax before your flight.
